```mjs title=main.mjs
import * as __rspack_external_fs from "fs";

// fs

// ./index.js


it("should allow probing external namespace properties", () => {
  const presentKey = ["read", "File"].join("");
  const missingKey = ["not", "There"].join("");

  expect(__rspack_external_fs["default"]).toBeDefined();
  expect(Reflect.get(__rspack_external_fs, presentKey)).toBeDefined();
  expect(Reflect.get(__rspack_external_fs, missingKey)).toBeUndefined();
});

export {};

```
